name: Aureus Greenway Holdings Inc
business: Aureus Greenway Holdings Inc owns and operates two public golf country clubs in Florida, offering golf recreation, membership dues, food and beverage services, and ancillary services. The company targets local residents and tourists in the greater Orlando area, providing golf courses, clubhouses, aquatic driving ranges, and event spaces. Its revenue streams include green fees, membership fees, food and beverage sales, and merchandise sales.
namedSuppliers: SSS Down to Earth Opco, LLC

exposures.sentence: We own and operate two public golf country clubs in Florida that each feature a golf-club, consisting of over 289 acres of multi-service recreational property.

catalysts.event: Reopening of Remington Golf Club after renovation
catalysts.sentence: The renovation was successfully completed, and the golf club was re-opened on October 3, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: There were more than 1,200 golf-courses in Florida, which collectively host more than 48 million rounds on a yearly basis in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe there were more than 1,200 golf-courses in Florida, which collectively host more than 48 million rounds on a yearly basis in 2022.

tamClaims.claim: There were more than 16,000 golf clubs in the United States in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the golf country club industry in United States is competitive with than more 16,000 clubs in United States in 2022.
